input_text:
Attempted to upgrade from Python 3.10 to 3.12 to get the performance improvements and new language features.

Blocker: one of our core dependencies uses greenlet, a C extension for coroutine switching. The greenlet build for Python 3.12 had a C API incompatibility with the version of gevent our code depends on. The gevent team was aware but hadn't released a fix yet.

Reverting to Python 3.10. Will re-evaluate in 3-6 months when the ecosystem catches up.

expected_negatives.why: One of our core dependencies uses greenlet (C extension), whose 3.12 build has a C-API incompatibility with our pinned gevent version. The gevent team is aware but hasn't released a fix. Reverted to 3.10; will re-evaluate in 3–6 months.

reviewer_notes: Ecosystem readiness blocked the upgrade — explicit re-evaluation window.
